title: cherleria laricifolia subsp. kitaibelii
intro: Cherleria laricifolia subsp. kitaibelii, also known as Lomatogonium caruifolium subsp. kitaibelii, is a plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to Europe, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cherleria laricifolia subsp. kitaibelii include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
